creator: olli@secnetix.de
text:
The mail/py-milter port is currently at version 0.8.2,
   which is very old.  The patch below updates it to the
   current version 0.8.6.

   I have sent the patch to the maintainer Georg Graf --
   georg@graf.priv.at -- and asked for his "OK" before
   submitting this PR.  He doesn't object.

How-To-Repeat: 		n/a
